product_overview: Web application to manage office inventory: track stock levels, record incoming/outgoing transactions with room assignment, and generate exports/reports for operational use. Supports role-based access for admins and regular users.
core_goals: Allow users to view current inventory and item details
Allow users to record stock movements (masuk/keluar/masuk_keluar) and see resulting stock changes
Enable admins to manage master data: items (barang), rooms (ruangan), and users
Provide exports and printable reports: Excel exports, quarterly stock opname DOCX, and receipt DOCX
Provide quick stock update and transaction history visibility for each item

features.name: Authentication System
features.description: Authenticate users and enforce role-based access so admins and regular users see appropriate functionality.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Enter username -> Enter password -> Submit credentials -> See dashboard
Navigate to /login -> Enter invalid credentials -> Submit credentials -> See error message indicating invalid credentials
Be on a protected page -> Trigger logout -> Be redirected to /login

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: Provide a landing page with personalized welcome, inventory statistics, recent transactions and quick actions to start common tasks.
user_flows: Authenticate and arrive at /dashboard -> See welcome message with user name and role badge -> See statistic cards for total items, low-stock items, today's transactions, and this month's transactions -> Use quick action to go to transaction creation or item list
Authenticate and arrive at /dashboard -> See list of recent transactions -> Use link to open full transaction list at /transaksi

features.name: Barang Management
features.description: List, search, filter, create, edit, export and manage stock for inventory items; admins can manage master item data while all roles can view and update stock.
user_flows: Authenticate -> Navigate to /barang -> See paginated list of items with search and category filter -> Use search to find an item -> See filtered list
Authenticate as admin -> Navigate to /barang/create -> Enter new item data -> Submit form -> Be redirected to /barang with success message

Authenticate -> Navigate to /barang -> Select an item from the list -> See item details and recent transaction history -> Choose to update stock -> Enter new stock value -> Submit update -> See updated stock reflected in item details

Authenticate as admin -> Navigate to /barang -> Select one or more items via checkboxes -> Trigger bulk delete -> Confirm deletion -> If an item has related transactions then see message that item cannot be deleted; otherwise see success message
Authenticate -> Navigate to /barang -> Click export -> Download Excel file

features.name: Transaksi Management
features.description: Create and manage transactions that change stock (incoming, outgoing, combined), view and filter transaction history, and export transaction data.
user_flows: Authenticate -> Navigate to /transaksi/create -> Choose transaction type 'masuk' -> Select item from searchable list -> Observe current stock displayed -> Enter jumlah_masuk and tanggal -> Submit transaction -> Be redirected to /transaksi and see new transaction with updated stock

Authenticate -> Navigate to /transaksi/create -> Choose transaction type 'keluar' -> Select item from searchable list -> Observe current stock displayed -> Enter jumlah_keluar less than or equal to current stock -> Select ruangan and enter nama_pengambil -> Submit transaction -> Be redirected to /transaksi and see new transaction with reduced stock

Authenticate -> Navigate to /transaksi/create -> Choose transaction type 'keluar' -> Select item from searchable list -> Observe current stock displayed -> Enter jumlah_keluar greater than current stock -> Submit transaction -> See validation error indicating jumlah_keluar exceeds available stock
Authenticate -> Navigate to /transaksi -> Use date range and type filters -> See filtered, paginated transaction list -> Click export -> Download Excel file

features.name: Ruangan Management
features.description: Manage rooms/locations used as transaction destinations; admins can create, edit and delete rooms while all users can view the list.
user_flows: Authenticate -> Navigate to /ruangan -> See paginated list of rooms with transaction counts -> Use search to find a room
Authenticate as admin -> Navigate to /ruangan/create -> Enter room name and optional description -> Submit form -> Be redirected to /ruangan with success message

Authenticate as admin -> Navigate to /ruangan -> Select a room -> Trigger delete -> Confirm deletion -> If room has related transactions then see validation message and cancel deletion; otherwise see success message

features.name: User Management
features.description: Admin-only interface to create, list, edit and delete user accounts with role assignment and protections (cannot delete own account).
user_flows: Authenticate as admin -> Navigate to /users -> See paginated list of users with role badges and search -> Use role filter to narrow results
Authenticate as admin -> Navigate to /users/create -> Enter name, username, email, password and role -> Submit form -> Be redirected to /users with success message

Authenticate as admin -> Navigate to /users -> Select a user to delete -> Confirm deletion -> If selected user is the current admin then see error preventing self-deletion; otherwise see success message

features.name: Quarterly Stock Opname
features.description: Generate quarterly stock opname reports for a selected quarter and year, preview data and export as DOCX.
user_flows: Authenticate -> Navigate to /quarterly-stock -> Select quarter and year -> Preview opname table -> Trigger export -> Download DOCX file named with quarter and year
Authenticate -> Navigate to /quarterly-stock -> Select quarter and year with no matching data -> See preview indicating empty result set before export

features.name: Surat Tanda Terima
features.description: Create receipt letters for transactions by entering document metadata and item list, previewing and generating a DOCX file suitable for printing.
user_flows: Authenticate -> Navigate to /surat-tanda-terima -> Enter nomor_surat, tanggal, dari, kepada and barang_list -> Preview the letter -> Generate document -> Download DOCX receipt
Authenticate -> Navigate to /surat-tanda-terima -> Leave required field empty -> Attempt to generate -> See validation error indicating required fields

features.name: Authentication System
features.description: User login/logout with role-based access control (admin/pengguna)

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: Main dashboard showing inventory statistics and overview

features.name: Barang Management
features.description: CRUD operations for inventory items with stock tracking

endpoints.description: List all items with search, filter, pagination
Store new item or add stock to existing

request_schema.body: nama_barang (string), kategori (enum), satuan (string), stok (int), stok_minimum (int), catatan (string|null)

endpoints.description: Show item details with transaction history
Quick stock update with auto transaction creation

features.name: Transaksi Management
features.description: Transaction tracking for stock in/out with room assignment

request_schema.body: barang_id (int), jumlah_masuk (int|null), jumlah_keluar (int|null), tanggal_masuk (date|null), tanggal_keluar (date|null), ruangan_id (int|null), nama_pengambil (string|null), tipe_pengambil (enum|null), keterangan (string|null)

endpoints.description: Export transactions with multiple filter options

features.name: User Management
features.description: Admin-only user management with role assignment

request_schema.body: name (string), username (string), email (string), password (string), role (enum: admin, pengguna)

known_limitations.issue: Some bulk delete operations may fail if items have related transactions
known_limitations.impact: Users cannot delete items with transaction history

known_limitations.issue: Stock calculation after transaction deletion uses full recalculation
known_limitations.impact: May be slow with large transaction volumes
